ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course (e.g., A4856-1) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course (e.g., Transitional Geometries) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON array of prerequisite course IDs */,
  "co_prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON array of co-requisite course IDs */,
  "cross_listed_courses" TEXT /* JSON array of cross-listed course IDs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the course details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester in which the course is being offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "call_number" INTEGER /* Call number assigned to the course offering */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Syllabus for the course offering */,
  "is_full" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course offering is full */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course offering */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course offering */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course offering is cancelled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the course offering details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2022) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the semester is the current one */,
  "is_open_for_registration" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the semester is open for registration */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for registration */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date for registration */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the semester details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instructor details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson of the department */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES chairpersons ("chairperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chairpersons" (
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chairperson */,
  "chairperson_name" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the chairperson */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the chairperson belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the chairperson */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the chairperson */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the chairperson details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chairperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the student is enrolled in */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the major */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the major details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the student is enrolled in */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "is_dropped" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student has dropped the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date when the student dropped the course */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("course_offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering with this schedule */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course (e.g., WARE LOUNGE W) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the course (e.g., 9 AM - 11 AM) */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is online */,
  "days_of_week" TEXT /* JSON array of days on which the course is held (e.g., ['Monday', 'Wednesday', 'Friday']) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_course_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("course_offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building the location is in */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room number of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the location is available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with this requirement */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., prerequisite, co-requisite) */,
  "requirement_text" TEXT /* Text describing the requirement */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the requirement is mandatory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the requirement details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with this sequence */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Number of the sequence */,
  "sequence_text" TEXT /* Text describing the sequence */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sequence is required */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sequence details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_points" (
  "session_points_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session points */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering with this session points */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Number of the session */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points the session is worth */,
  "is_bonus" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the session points are bonus points */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session points details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_points_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_points_course_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("course_offering_id")
)
